10.evidenceText: No pricing information found in either source provided

27.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 Tubeless Ventil - schwarz | 40 mm | 2 Stück | BIKE24
27.evidenceText: Four distinct product pages identified: (1) https://www.bike24.de/p1993546.html (schwarz 40mm), (2) https://www.bike24.de/p1993549.html (Kupfer 40mm), (3) https://www.bike24.de/p1993551.html (Kupfer 80mm), (4) https://www.bike24.de/p1993583.html (BTI-165 Ventilkern Gold)
27.extractionRationale: Counted all unique product page URLs from the provided sources. Each URL represents a distinct CoreCap product listing on bike24.de German market, including different color and size variants, as well as different product models (BTI-166 valve vs BTI-165 valve core).

30.evidenceText: All 4 product listings contain only product descriptions and features. No stock status information (out of stock, unavailable, nicht verfügbar, ausverkauft) is present in any of the provided content excerpts.
30.extractionRationale: Stock status cannot be determined from the provided text. The content shows only product descriptions and features for 4 CoreCap variants, with no mention of availability or stock status in the excerpted material.

56.evidenceText: Schlauch - No. 17 | 28-47/622-635 | Clik Valve (SCV); Schlauch - No. 19 | 27.5/28/29 Zoll | 40-62/622-635 | Clik Valve (SCV); Schlauch - Nr. 6 | 20" - 28/40-406 | Clik Valve (SCV); Schlauch - Nr. 13 | 26" - 40/62-559 | Clik Valve (SCV); Schlauch - No. 15-EL (Extra Light) | 28" - 23/28-622/630 | SCV (Clik Valve); Schlauch - No. 17-EL (Extra Light) | 28" - 28/44-622 | SCV (Clik Valve); Schlauch - No. 19L | 27.5"/28"/29" | MTB+ - 54/75-584/622 | SCV 40mm (Clik Valve); Schlauch - Nr. 15 | 28"/700C -
56.extractionRationale: Counted all distinct Schwalbe inner tube models (Schlauch) with Clik Valve interface across 5 sources. Excluded conversion kits (Umrüstkit) and valve sets. Each unique tube model/SKU is counted once, regardless of size variations.

61.evidenceText: LME Aluminium Alloy Official Prices showing 3215.00 and 3225.00, but these are alloy prices not pure aluminum spot price
61.extractionRationale: The provided sources show LME Aluminium Alloy prices and premium data, but do not clearly state the current LME aluminum spot price in USD per metric ton. Source 1 appears to be alloy prices and Source 2 shows premiums/spreads, neither of which directly represent the base spot price requested.
